scripts.build: bun run dts && bun run --filter './packages/*' build && bun run --filter './builds/*' build
scripts.test: bunx @biomejs/biome ci . && bun run build && bunx vitest run
scripts.test:ff: bunx @biomejs/biome ci . && bun run build && VITEST_BROWSERS=firefox bunx vitest run
scripts.test:coverage: bun run build && bunx vitest run --coverage --project browser
scripts.verify: bunx @biomejs/biome check . && bunx tsc && bun run build && bun run verify:types && bun run verify:esm && bunx vitest run
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/*/dist packages/*/types builds/*/dist builds/*/types coverage .dts-tmp
